description: This file defines a Bootstrap Toast component class, including its properties, methods, event handling, and integration with jQuery. It imports external modules for event handling, base component functionality, and utility functions, and exports the Toast class as the default export.

classes.name: Toast
classes.description: A class representing a Bootstrap toast component, providing methods to show, hide, and manage toast notifications with event handling and configuration options.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Displays the toast notification, triggers show events, manages CSS classes for animation, and schedules auto-hide if configured.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the toast notification, triggers hide events, and manages CSS classes for animation.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Cleans up the toast instance, clears timers, and removes CSS classes.

methods.name: isShown
methods.description: Returns true if the toast is currently visible.

methods.name: _maybeScheduleHide
methods.description: Schedules the toast to hide after a delay if autohide is enabled and no user interaction is ongoing.

methods.name: _onInteraction
methods.description: Handles user interactions such as mouseover, mouseout, focusin, and focusout to manage auto-hide behavior.

methods.name: _setListeners
methods.description: Sets up event listeners for user interactions on the toast element.

methods.name: static jQueryInterface
methods.description: Enables jQuery-style invocation of toast methods.
